genre_preference.value: disliked romance, comedy, and poorly executed thrillers
evidence: "What an absolutely repulsive and despicable movie."
"The story just stunk. Vague, confusing, half-hearted."
"No idea what they were trying to achieve with this muddled story."
"A movie that plods along to nothingness."
"Extreme stretches of slow panning around whilst a morose music plays."
"The acting, dialogue and movements of each episode are realistic and engrossing."
"Good production value. Acting, dialogue, and scenery are all well done."
"The 90's called. It wants its movie back."
"This season blows more than Bosch's Coltrane records."
"dialog is super low and all the other sound effects are super high."
"I feel like the writers and producers are reaching for some kind of quirky Twin Peaks feel."
"This has NOTHING do to with Yorkshire Ripper."

summary: The user has a strong aversion to poorly executed romantic comedies and thrillers, often criticizing their narratives and pacing. They value high production quality but show little emotional engagement with the content.
